info.name: Lead Gen API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Lead Gen auth + campaigns backend.

**Setup:**
1. Set the `baseUrl` variable to your server (default: http://localhost:3000)
2. Run **Sign Up** → check email for OTP → run **Verify OTP**
3. `accessToken` and `refreshToken` are saved automatically from login/verify responses
4. All campaign requests use the saved `accessToken` automatically

originalRequest.description: Verify the server is running.

request.description: Create a new account. Returns a `userId` — saved automatically to the collection variable. Check your email for the 6-digit OTP.

response.name: 201 Created

originalRequest.description: Create a new account. Returns a `userId` — saved automatically to the collection variable. Check your email for the 6-digit OTP.

response.name: 422 Validation Error

originalRequest.description: Create a new account. Returns a `userId` — saved automatically to the collection variable. Check your email for the 6-digit OTP.

request.description: Verify the OTP sent to email. Replace `123456` with the real OTP. On success, `accessToken` and `refreshToken` are saved automatically.

Verify the OTP sent to email. Replace `123456` with the real OTP. On success, `accessToken` and `refreshToken` are saved automatically.

request.description: Resend a fresh OTP to the user's email. Uses the saved `userId` variable.

request.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair (token rotation). The old refresh token is invalidated. Both new tokens are saved automatically.

originalRequest.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair (token rotation). The old refresh token is invalidated. Both new tokens are saved automatically.

request.description: Revoke the current refresh token (logout from this device). The access token expires naturally after 15 minutes.

originalRequest.description: Revoke the current refresh token (logout from this device). The access token expires naturally after 15 minutes.

request.description: Revoke ALL refresh tokens for the authenticated user — logs out every device. Requires a valid access token.

query.description: Filter by status: draft | active | paused | completed

request.description:
List all campaigns for the authenticated user. Supports pagination and status filtering.

Optional query params:
- `page` — page number (default: 1)
- `limit` — results per page (default: 20, max: 100)
- `status` — filter by `draft`, `active`, `paused`, or `completed`

item.name: Send Email to Multiple Recipients Copy

response.name: Send Email to Multiple Recipients Copy

request.description:
Automatically picks `target_leads` random rows from the `leads_data` table (skipping any leads already assigned to this campaign) and inserts them into `campaign_leads` with status `pending`.

No request body required — the count is read from the campaign's `target_leads` field.

**Returns:**
- `totalRequested` — the campaign's `target_leads` value
- `totalAvailable` — how many unassigned leads were found in `leads_data`
- `totalInserted` — leads successfully inserted
- `totalDuplicates` — leads skipped (already existed in the campaign)
- `inserted` — array of the newly created `campaign_leads` rows

**Error cases:**
- `400` — campaign `target_leads` is 0 or not set
- `404` — campaign not found, or no available leads remain in `leads_data`

response.name: 201 Created — Leads Assigned
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "50 lead(s) randomly assigned. 0 duplicate(s) skipped.",
  "data": {
    "totalRequested": 50,
    "totalAvailable": 50,
    "totalInserted": 50,
    "totalDuplicates": 0,
    "duplicates": [],
    "inserted": [
      {
        "id": "uuid-campaign-lead-1",
        "user_id": "uuid-user",
        "campaign_id": "uuid-campaign",
        "lead_data_id": "1042",
        "mail_template": null,
        "status": "pending",
        "sent_at": null,
        "error_message": null,
        "created_at": "2026-05-05T10:00:00Z"
      }
    ]
  }
}

response.name: 400 target_leads Not Set
404 No Available Leads

request.description:
Generates a personalised `mail_template` for every `pending` lead in the campaign using Claude AI.

For each lead the service:
1. Fetches the full `leads_data` row
2. Looks up `linkedinscrapping` by `leads_data.linkedin` URL
3. Looks up `webscrapping` by `leads_data.domain`
4. Sends all enrichment data + the campaign's `mail_template` skeleton + `example_training` style guide to Claude
5. Saves the personalised result back to `campaign_leads.mail_template`

**Optional body param:**
- `campaign_lead_id` — UUID of a single campaign lead to process instead of all pending leads. Set to `null` (or omit) to process all.

**Requires:** `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` in your `.env`.

response.name: 200 OK — Templates Generated
200 OK — Single Lead
404 No Pending Leads

item.name: Send Emails to Campaign Leads (AI Template)

request.description:
Sends the AI-generated `mail_template` to every `pending` campaign lead that has one.

**Auto Token Refresh:**
The service now refreshes the Google OAuth access token automatically before every individual send. This prevents mid-loop 401 errors on large campaigns where the 10s–60s inter-send delays can span the token's 1-hour TTL.

**Features:**
- Auto-refreshes Google OAuth token before each email send
- Random delay (10s–60s) between each send to avoid spam filters
- Hard cap of 500 emails per UTC calendar day across all campaigns
- Mirrors send status back to `leads_data` (outreachStatus, emailSent, emailSentDate)

**Body params (all optional):**
- `campaign_lead_id` — UUID: restrict send to a single lead (null = all pending)
- `access_token` — Google OAuth2 token; omit to use the token stored in DB (auto-refreshed)
- `auto_refresh_token` — boolean (default: true); set false to disable mid-loop refresh

**Requires:** Google OAuth2 token with Gmail send scope.

**Workflow:** Run `generate-templates` first, then call this endpoint.

response.name: 200 OK — Emails Sent
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "3 email(s) sent, 0 failed, 0 skipped.",
  "data": {
    "sent": 3,
    "failed": 0,
    "skipped": 0,
    "total": 3,
    "dailyLimitReached": false,
    "alreadySentToday": 3,
    "totalSentToday": 3,
    "dailyLimit": 500,
    "results": [
      {
        "campaignLeadId": "uuid-campaign-lead-1",
        "status": "sent",
        "to": "john.smith@acmecorp.com",
        "subject": "Quick question about Acme Corp's growth plans",
        "messageId": "18f3a2b1c4d5e6f7"
      },
      {
        "campaignLeadId": "uuid-campaign-lead-2",
        "status": "sent",
        "to": "sara.lee@techco.com",
        "subject": "Helping TechCo scale outbound",
        "messageId": "18f3a2b1c4d5e6f8"
      }
    ],
    "tokensRefreshed": 0
  }
}

response.name: 200 OK — With Token Auto-Refreshed
